summary: TWO_COLUMN Taylor remainder for e^x. LEFT axes with BLUE e^x reference + YELLOW partial Taylor polynomial P_n with RED filled |e^x − P_n| error band. ValueTracker n_tr steps 1→8 via always_redraw. RIGHT has live n, sup-error on [-1.5, 1.5], and Lagrange bound e·x_max^(n+1)/(n+1)! — both shrink.
